overall.description: Sci-fi game footage from a third-person perspective showing two armored characters in a dimly lit indoor shooting range facility. The characters examine paper targets before proceeding through a caged doorway into a storage area, featuring industrial metal architecture and artificial lighting with green and orange tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor shooting range with target practice silhouettes

events.description: companion character lowers weapon and begins moving away from the shooting position

agents.ego_description: standing in the shooting range observing the paper targets while the companion aims their weapon

notable_agents.action: aiming rifle at the paper targets on the far wall

entered.detail: five paper silhouette targets mounted on the back wall
long wooden workbench with equipment in the center of the room
industrial wire mesh wall paneling with grid pattern
tall metal storage lockers with red lighting above
stacked cardboard boxes beneath the wooden table

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit industrial shooting range with green-tinted artificial lighting. Paper silhouette targets hang on the far wall while the player character observes and a companion aims a rifle. The room features metal mesh walls, storage lockers, and a central wooden workbench.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to caged storage area

events.description: both characters begin walking away from the shooting range toward the exit
approaching the metal caged doorway leading to the storage room

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit doorway following the companion character

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the caged doorway

entered.detail: metal mesh security gate leading to the adjacent storage room

segments.scene_description: The characters leave the main shooting area and walk through a narrow corridor with orange emergency lighting. They approach a caged security doorway, passing industrial pillars as the shooting range equipment disappears behind them.

scene_state.functional_zone: caged storage room with metal shelving units

events.description: entering the caged storage area with metal shelves and supply boxes
characters slow down and examine the storage shelves

agents.ego_description: moving through the storage room and examining the metal shelving units

notable_agents.action: examining items on the metal storage shelves

entered.detail: tall industrial metal racks holding various supply boxes
cardboard and plastic containers stacked on shelves and floor
floor-to-ceiling metal mesh walls enclosing the storage area

segments.scene_description: The characters enter a smaller caged storage room with orange lighting and metal shelving units lining the walls. They move through the space examining supply boxes while the camera follows their exploration of the enclosed metal-walled area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit industrial shooting range into a confined, orange-hued storage area. It begins in a green-tinted facility where armored characters stand among metal mesh walls and wooden workbenches, observing paper silhouette targets. As the characters move away from the range, the scene shifts into a narrow corridor where the green light gives way to orange emergency lighting and industrial pillars. The camera then follows them through a caged security doorway, leaving the shooting equipment behind to enter a smaller storage room. Finally, the movement concludes as the characters explore the enclosed metal-walled space, passing by shelving units and supply boxes under the persistent orange glow.
